text:
It's hard to believe these stories will ever come true... Or did I just imagine them?

You meet again every year. Every summer. Every month this time limit stretches out. Your anniversary.

You see each other at the same café. The last place you ever thought you'd stay alive long enough to meet again.

You argue over whether it's the moon or just a particularly thick fog that causes birds to fly upside down. You claim their wings flutter faster. I claim I saw one levitate. We never resolve it.

There are times you can't remember how you met. Or maybe you just forget. I've been there. With me.

We're getting old. We've both gone silent. But every day we spend together feels worth it. We talk less. We laugh less. But we laugh every time you suggest we hang out even less.

Finally, you decide it's time. You say, "I need to know everything about you. Every detail."

"You're funny,"
